text: Dibbendu Roy has moved to IIT Kharagpur (GSSST) from IIT Indore — the LAN Lab is now based at IIT Kharagpur.
The group secured DoT-TTDF funding for DARPAN — an AI-assisted Digital Twin for Sixth Sense 6G (IIT Indore).
The group secured ANRF PMECRG funding for the project Causal AI for XR Protocols (IIT Indore).
